meta.title: Flashcardia — Expand Your Vocabulary. Never Forget a Word.
meta.description: The intelligent flashcard ecosystem for capturing, retaining, and mastering knowledge. Convert short-term memory into long-term mastery.

hero.subtitle: The AI-powered ecosystem for capturing, retaining, and mastering knowledge. Convert short-term memory into long-term mastery.

phone_review.reliable_def: Consistently good in quality or performance; able to be trusted
phone_review.reliable_ex1: "She's a reliable friend, always there to help"
phone_review.reliable_ex2: "The company is reliable and delivers high-quality products"

phone_setup.info:
Just finish all cards. No score requirements.
Great for practice.

phone_score.create_def: to make or bring into existence something new
phone_score.feedback: The word 'create' is used in the sentence, but it's not entirely clear what you mean by 'create a word'. The phrase could be improved for better clarity and specificity.
phone_score.better_sentence: I am going to create a new word for our game.

generation.pan_comido_def: A task or situation that is easy to do or deal with.
generation.math_exam: The math exam was a piece of cake, I finished early.
generation.interview: Don't worry about the interview, it'll be a piece of cake.
generation.subtitle: Don't waste time typing definitions. Simply speak or type a word, and let the AI do the heavy lifting to expand it into a comprehensive study tool.
generation.feature1_desc: Accurate pronunciation guides and clear, context-aware definitions.
generation.feature2_desc: Direct translation into your native language instantly generated by AI.
generation.feature3_desc: Learn how the word is used in real life with contextual usage examples automatically created for your level.

challenge_mode.subtitle: Move beyond simple memorization. Test your ability to use your vocabulary in real sentences and ensure you truly understand the nuance and context of every word.
challenge_mode.feature1_desc: Practice casually in Easy Mode or face the strict AI judge in Hard Mode where you must score > 5.5 to pass.
challenge_mode.feature2_desc: Given a word and its definition, your task is to write a complete, grammatically correct sentence.
challenge_mode.feature3_desc: Get immediate feedback on grammar and clarity. The AI even suggests a more native alternative to improve your fluency.
challenge_mode.create_def: to make or bring into existence something new
challenge_mode.sentence: I am going to create a new word for this situation.
challenge_mode.suggestion_text: The phrase is grammatically correct but sounds a bit unnatural.
challenge_mode.better_way_text: "I'm going to coin a new term for this."

system.subtitle: The intelligent engine that powers your learning journey. Built with cognitive science to optimize your memory retention natively.
system.scheduler_desc: Automatically identifies which cards you're about to forget and schedules them for review at the perfect moment.
system.sync_desc: Your progress travels with you. Seamlessly sync between your iPhone, iPad, and Web. Always encrypted and safe.
system.challenge_desc: Push your limits with intensity settings. Rapid-fire rounds to test your reflex and deep recall abilities.
